name: md-slide-studio-monorepo
description: Markdown原稿からスライドHTML／PDF／PNGを生成するWebアプリ（monorepo）

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mdss/core && npm run build -w @mdss/app
scripts.test: npm run test -w @mdss/core && npm run test -w @mdss/app && npm run test -w mdss-convert
scripts.test:cov: npm run test:cov -w @mdss/core && npm run test:cov -w @mdss/app
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/app/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint && npm run test:e2e
